name: SP8192 + MuonEq-R + Loop@0.42 + RECUR_AB + QAT-lite + Compact Artifact
author: Chidera Ibe
notes: Single-seed legal non-record run from the recurrence-native research branch. Main novel ideas are RECUR_AB recurrent alpha/beta blending, wallclock-aware recurrence activation at 0.42, targeted late q/k QAT-lite, and compact artifact engineering to fit the 16MB cap.
